core_info.founded_claim: With over 10 years of operation in the roofing sector

service_list.name: Roof Repair
service_list.brief: They repair roofing issues including broken roof tiles, rusty metal sheets and severely damaged roofs.

service_list.name: Roof Painting and Sealing
service_list.brief: They provide roof painting and sealing as part of roof restoration work.

service_list.name: Re-Roofing
service_list.brief: They offer re-roofing for customers needing a brand new roof.

service_list.name: Roof Ventilation Systems
service_list.brief: They install roof ventilation systems including whirlybird and ventilation options.

service_list.name: Roof Re-pointing
service_list.brief: They provide roof repointing services as part of roof restoration.

service_list.name: Gutter Repair and Replacement
service_list.brief: They repair, restore and replace gutters.

service_list.name: Roof Washing and Cleaning
service_list.brief: They provide roof washing and cleaning as listed on the About page.

service_list.name: Roof Inspection / Report
service_list.brief: They offer roof inspection and report requests through the quote form.

options.subhead: Restore, repair or repaint your tiled, metal, Colorbond or terracotta roof with a local Brisbane roofing team. Request a free quote today.

options.h1: Bring Your Brisbane Roof Back to Its Best
options.subhead: From leaking tiles and rusty sheets to full restorations, Brisbane Roof Restoration Experts recommends practical, cost-effective roofing solutions.

options.h1: Roof Repairs, Restoration and Re-Roofing Across Brisbane
options.subhead: A one-stop local roofing team for inspections, repairs, painting, sealing, repointing, gutters and ventilation.

items.name: Roof Repair
items.description: Fix broken tiles, rusty metal sheets, leaks and roof damage before small issues become expensive structural problems.

items.name: Roof Painting and Sealing
items.description: Refresh the appearance of your roof and help protect it from Brisbane weather with professional painting and sealing.

items.name: Re-Roofing
items.description: When restoration is not the best option, replace your roof with a new roofing system suited to your property.

items.name: Roof Ventilation Systems
items.description: Improve roof space airflow with ventilation options such as whirlybirds.

items.name: Roof Re-pointing
items.description: Restore ridge capping and roof pointing to help keep tiled roofs secure and weather resistant.

items.name: Gutter Repair and Replacement
items.description: Repair or replace damaged gutters so rainwater drains properly away from the home.

items.name: Roof Washing and Cleaning
items.description: Remove built-up grime and prepare the roof surface for restoration, sealing or painting.

items.name: Roof Inspection / Report
items.description: Get a practical roof assessment and a recommended scope of work before deciding on repairs or restoration.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the clear local positioning, phone-led calls to action, free quote form, roof-type breadth, and service-area SEO structure. Improve the site by removing repeated and awkward copy, tightening service explanations, making the quote pathway easier to scan, adding visible trust signals, clarifying licensing or credentials if available, and using stronger project imagery. The redesign matters because the current site has useful local SEO content but reads generic in places; a cleaner, more credible design can increase quote enquiries and help homeowners quickly understand whether repair, restoration or replacement is right for their roof.

ready_to_build_concerns: No email address found in supplied scrape
